title: Squirrel Removal in Mount Vernon, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Mount Vernon, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving all neighborhoods. Call for fast service!
intro: Mount Vernon homeowners know that squirrels can cause serious damage to attics, soffits, and roofing materials. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Mount Vernon, from the historic Fleetwood neighborhood to South Side's charming homes. Our humane removal process ensures your property is protected from these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven squirrel exclusion techniques. Our certified technicians understand Mount Vernon's unique architecture and provide customized solutions with warranties to keep squirrels out permanently.
localContext: Mount Vernon's mix of Victorian-era homes, pre-war apartment buildings, and tree-lined streets near Hutchinson River Parkway creates ideal habitats for squirrel populations. The mature oak and maple trees throughout neighborhoods like Chester Heights and Oakley provide easy access routes to roofs and attics, making professional exclusion essential.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Mount Vernon?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Mount Vernon typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and preventative sealing. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Mount Vernon home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic during early morning or evening, visible damage to soffits or fascia boards, chewed wires or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. Mount Vernon's older homes are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through deteriorated vents and roof gaps.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Mount Vernon humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-catch traps and follow all New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated away from residential areas. We never use poisons or lethal methods, ensuring ethical treatment while effectively solving your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take in Mount Vernon?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Mount Vernon take 3-10 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points. Initial trapping typically takes 3-5 days, followed by exclusion work and repairs. We'll monitor the situation to ensure all squirrels are removed before permanently sealing entry points to prevent re-entry.
